sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMETZ);
INSERT INTO test_time (id, event_time) VALUES (1, curtime());
UPDATE test_time SET event_time = curtime() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_time WHERE event_time > curtime() - INTERVAL '1 hour';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_time WHERE event_time < curtime();
